description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic and Hebrew alphanumerals. Dating is 16th- or 17th-century based on the paleography. The recto mentions two food items of pepper and ginger, specifically: פלפל מגלד// זנגביל בלדי. The name Khawaja/Hoca Aḥm[ad] appears in the upper portion of the recto heading. MCD.
tags: ginger, pepper, early modern, 16th or 17th c
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
